document_name: Meta Internal Audit of Cambridge Analytica Data Breach and FTC Consent Decree Risks

document_sentence_array.text: Meta, then operating as Facebook, relies on a vast ecosystem of third-party developers to enhance user engagement through integrated applications.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: An internal audit finalized this evening confirms that the total number of compromised user profiles is approximately 87 million, significantly higher than the 50 million currently being reported by the press.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The company has faced increasing scrutiny over its data-sharing practices following recent investigative reports in the Guardian and the New York Times.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Legal counsel is currently reviewing the platform’s 'Terms of Service' from 2014 to determine the extent of liability regarding 'Friends of Friends' data access.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential communication from the Federal Trade Commission indicates that a non-public investigation into a potential breach of the 2011 Consent Decree will be opened within 48 hours.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The protection of user privacy is a core component of maintaining trust within the global social media community.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal board minutes suggest that the company is preparing to set aside an unannounced $3 billion litigation reserve to handle anticipated fines and class-action settlements.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Market analysts have begun to lower their price targets for the stock, citing a 'reputational discount' that may affect long-term ad-buying behavior.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Private correspondence between the CEO and the Head of Policy reveals a secret decision to suspend Global Science Research (GSR) and Cambridge Analytica from the platform effective immediately.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Data portability features were originally intended to give users control over their information across different digital services.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential draft of Mark Zuckerberg's upcoming public statement includes a secret commitment to undergo a full forensic audit of every app that had access to large amounts of data before 2014.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is monitoring for any unusual selling activity from executive-level insiders ahead of the formal public response scheduled for tomorrow.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The advertising industry has historically leveraged granular user data to improve the relevance of sponsored content.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal revenue forecasting models show an unannounced 5% decline in projected European ad revenue due to the early impact of GDPR-related privacy concerns.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our research desk is evaluating the probability of the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) issuing a maximum fine under the Data Protection Act.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Corporate transparency is essential for shareholders to accurately value technology companies in a rapidly evolving regulatory environment.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A secret 'Crisis Management' memo outlines a plan to spend an unannounced $500 million on a global brand-rehabilitation campaign titled 'Facebook Here for Good'.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Investors are closely watching the 'Delete Facebook' movement on rival platforms to see if it translates into a material drop in daily active users.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The company employs a large team of security professionals dedicated to preventing unauthorized access to its internal databases.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence reveals that the company has discovered an unannounced data leak involving an unrelated developer that exposed the records of another 10 million users.
document_sentence_array.label: High
